ddls:
CREATE TABLE "daily_bike_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily usage record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the usage record */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season during which the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the usage record */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the usage record */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the day is a holiday */,
  "weekday" INTEGER /* Day of the week (0: Sunday, 1: Monday, ..., 6: Saturday) */,
  "workingday" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the day is a working day */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather condition during the day */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "feels_like" REAL /* Feels-like temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "casual_users" INTEGER /* Number of casual users on the day */,
  "registered_users" INTEGER /* Number of registered users on the day */,
  "total_users" INTEGER /* Total number of users on the day */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city event that occurred on the day */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance traveled by all users on the day */,
  "average_ride_duration" REAL /* Average duration of rides on the day */,
  "average_distance" REAL /* Average distance of rides on the day */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from bike rentals on the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_bike_usage_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_bike_usage_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES city_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_bike_usage_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., Spring, Summer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "weather_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather condition (e.g., Clear, Mist) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation in millimeters */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "uv_index" INTEGER /* UV index for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., casual, registered) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "total_rides" INTEGER /* Total number of rides taken by the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "preferred_bike_model" TEXT /* Preferred bike model of the user */,
  "preferred_start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred starting station */,
  "preferred_end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred ending station */,
  "feedback_score" REAL /* Average feedback score given by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rides" (
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ride */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the ride */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the ride */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the ride */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the ride started */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the ride ended */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the ride in minutes */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the ride in kilometers */,
  "ride_type" TEXT /* Type of ride (e.g., one-way, round-trip) */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike used for the ride */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route taken during the ride (e.g., a sequence of station IDs) */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather condition during the ride */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city event that occurred during the ride */,
  "price" REAL /* Price paid for the ride */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ride_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES city_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station (e.g., latitude, longitude) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the station (number of docks) */,
  "available_bikes" INTEGER /* Number of bikes currently available at the station */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the station information was last updated */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the station is located */,
  "zone" TEXT /* Zone or area within the city where the station is located */,
  "total_rides_started" INTEGER /* Total number of rides that started from this station */,
  "total_rides_ended" INTEGER /* Total number of rides that ended at this station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ride the feedback is about */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text comment from the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "suggested_improvements" TEXT /* Suggestions for improvements provided by the user */,
  "ride_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the ride (e.g., smoothness, bike condition) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_ride_id FOREIGN KEY ("ride_id") REFERENCES rides ("ride_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "issues_resolved" TEXT /* Issues resolved during the maintenance */,
  "next_scheduled_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance activity in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "bike_model" TEXT /* Model of the bike */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was purchased */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bike (e.g., available, in use, maintenance) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was last maintained */,
  "last_known_location" TEXT /* Last known location of the bike (e.g., station_id) */,
  "total_mileage" REAL /* Total distance traveled by the bike */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Current battery level of the bike (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "expected_impact" TEXT /* Expected impact on bike usage (e.g., high, low) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., parade, festival) */,
  "estimated_attendance" INTEGER /* Estimated number of attendees */,
  "actual_attendance" INTEGER /* Actual number of attendees (if known) */,
  "event_impact" TEXT /* Impact on bike usage (e.g., high, low, moderate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_events_event_date FOREIGN KEY ("event_date") REFERENCES daily_bike_usage ("date")
)
